specific_question: In Q1, 2024, how did Elexion Automotive track improvements in battery assembly time for its mid-range EV line?
answer: Elexion’s internal manufacturing dashboard recorded a 12% reduction in battery assembly time for the MX-300 model in Q1 2024 compared to Q4 2023, indicating improved production efficiency.
